startup.subtitle: Tidying up your cozy character-insight nook (｡･ω･｡)
startup.status.theme: Tuning the room lights just right...
startup.status.window: Setting up your desk and tiny notes...
startup.status.workspace: Lining up project notes in neat little rows...
startup.status.ready: All set, come on in ฅ^•ω•^ฅ
app.config.saved.title: Config saved
app.config.saved.content: CharaPicker saved the project config to {path}.
app.preview.done.title: Preview complete
app.preview.done.content: The insight stream and preview knowledge base are updated. Use the Character Cards page to generate a preview draft or compile a card.
app.full.done.title: Full extraction complete
app.full.done.content: The formal knowledge base has been updated: {count} chunks entered the processing flow. You can inspect projects/{project_id}/knowledge_base/.
app.full.failed.title: Full extraction failed
app.preview.lowTokenBudget.dialog.title: Output Tokens / Min is low
app.preview.lowTokenBudget.dialog.conten: Output Tokens / Min is currently {tokens_per_minute}, below the recommended {minimum}. Continuing may cut off model output, so some chunks may fail or produce incomplete results. Continue preview?
project.title: Project Nook
project.delete.dialog.title: Confirm Project Deletion
project.delete.dialog.content: Delete "{name}"? The project folder, sources, cache, and knowledge base will be removed together. This cannot be undone.
project.delete.success.title: Project Deleted
project.delete.success.content: "{name}" has been removed from the project list.
project.option.skipProviderRejectedChunk: When enabled, CharaPicker records a warning and continues with later chunks. When disabled, this condition stops the current preview or full extraction.
project.source.cleanRaw.dialog.title: Clean raw Source Files
project.source.cleanRaw.dialog.content: This will delete the selected sources from the project's raw folder to free space. After that, these sources cannot be re-encoded or re-segmented directly; you will need to re-import the originals. Continue?
project.source.cleanRaw.success.title: Raw Cleaned
project.source.cleanRaw.success.content: Cleaned {count} raw files and marked them in the project config.
project.source.status.new: New: not synced into the project raw folder yet.
project.source.status.processed: Processed: material is ready in the project materials folder.
project.source.status.stale: Needs update: raw exists but is unprocessed, or the source is newer than the project copy.
project.source.status.rawCleaned: Raw cleaned: the source is still usable, but cannot be re-encoded or re-segmented directly.
project.source.remove.success.title: Local Sources Deleted
project.source.remove.success.content: Removed the selected sources and cleaned their raw and materials files from the project.
project.processing.title: Material Prep Desk
project.processing.preset.original: Do not process, use original sources
project.processing.preset.segmentTransco: Segment and transcode to a compatible format
project.processing.done.title: Material prep complete
project.processing.done.original: Linked {count} raw source files into the materials folder.
project.processing.done.ffmpeg: Processed {count} source items and wrote outputs into the project materials folder.
project.processing.dialog.title: Prepping Materials
project.processing.cancelled.title: Source Processing Cancelled
project.processing.cancelled.content: The current source processing task has stopped.
project.processing.failure.title: Source Processing Failed
project.processing.failure.content: Something went wrong while processing sources: {error}
project.processing.encoderMismatch.title: Encoding device and target codec do not match
project.processing.encoderMismatch.conte: The selected device {device} cannot encode target codec {codec}. Please change one of them and try again.
project.processing.cpuWarning.title: CPU software encoding is selected
project.processing.cpuWarning.content: The selected encoder uses CPU software encoding. Processing may be slower and use higher CPU resources. Continue?
project.processing.placeholder.title: Processing is ready
project.processing.placeholder.content: FFmpeg is available. The real transcode/segment pipeline will be connected next.
project.ffmpeg.download.title: Download FFmpeg
project.ffmpeg.download.cancelled.title: Download cancelled
project.ffmpeg.download.cancelled.conten: FFmpeg download was cancelled. No new files were installed.
project.ffmpeg.download.success.title: FFmpeg is ready
project.ffmpeg.download.failure.title: FFmpeg download failed
project.ffmpeg.missing.dialog.title: FFmpeg missing
project.ffmpeg.missing.dialog.content: This processing plan requires FFmpeg. Please download and install it to the bin folder first.
project.whisper.status.missing: Whisper not configured: runtime and model are missing
project.whisper.download.title: Install Whisper
project.whisper.download.cancelled.title: Whisper installation cancelled
project.whisper.download.cancelled.conte: No new whisper.cpp runtime or model was installed.
project.whisper.download.success.title: Whisper is ready
project.whisper.download.failure.title: Whisper installation failed
project.whisper.advanced.title: Whisper Runtime Manager
project.whisper.advanced.description: Whisper is optional; missing Whisper will not block ordinary material prep.
project.whisper.advanced.defaultNote: The default recommendation is Windows x64 CPU runtime with the tiny model for a lighter download.
project.whisper.localRuntime.failure.con: Select a whisper.cpp runtime that can run --help successfully.
project.whisper.localRuntime.success.run: Runtime is usable: {path}. A Whisper model still needs to be installed or placed in the model folder.
project.whisper.delete.dialog.title: Delete Whisper runtime and models?
project.whisper.delete.dialog.content: This removes CharaPicker-managed bin/whisper.cpp and models/whisper contents, and clears the local runtime path setting.
project.whisper.delete.success.title: Whisper cleaned
project.whisper.delete.success.content: Removed managed runtime, models, and the local runtime setting.
project.whisper.delete.failure.title: Whisper cleanup failed
project.insights.title: Insight Brook
project.progress.label: Extraction Progress
project.new.dialog.title: New Project
project.new.dialog.label: Project Name
project.new.dialog.description: Give this nook a clear name. Future settings and source materials will be grouped under it.
cards.title: Character Cards
cards.noProject: Select or create a project before managing character cards.
cards.gallery.title: Card Gallery
cards.search.placeholder: Search name, alias, tag, or status
cards.tagFilter.empty: This project has no tags yet.
cards.empty.noCards: This project has no official character cards yet.
cards.status.noSelection: Select or create a character card.
cards.detail.title: Edit Card
cards.field.characterName.placeholder: Primary name used to match the formal knowledge base
cards.field.displayName.placeholder: Name shown in previews and exports; blank uses Character Name
cards.field.aliases.placeholder: Type an alias, then press Enter or Add
cards.field.tags.placeholder: Type a tag, then press Enter or Add
cards.field.notes.helper: Visible to AI; add character facts, setting basis, and cautions
cards.field.compileRequirements.helper: Visible to AI; specify purpose, output preferences, constraints, and format requirements
cards.field.compileRequirements.placehol: Enter extra requirements or prompt instructions...
cards.option.exportAstrbotAfterCompile: Also generate AstrBot copy sheet after compile
cards.outputSettings.hint: Changes to AI compile input or output settings may require recompiling before they take effect.
cards.new.dialog.title: New Character Card
cards.new.dialog.label: Character name
cards.new.dialog.description: Start with a clear character name. Aliases, notes, cover art, and compiled content can be added afterward.
cards.switchUnsaved.dialog.title: Save current changes?
cards.switchUnsaved.dialog.content: This character card has unsaved changes. Save them before switching to another card?
cards.delete.dialog.title: Delete Character Card
cards.delete.dialog.content: Delete "{name}"? This only removes this card from the project knowledge base and does not delete exported files.
cards.save.success.title: Character card saved
cards.save.success.content: Metadata was written to the CharaPicker JSON.
cards.load.failed.title: Failed to load card
cards.cover.dialog.title: Crop Cover
cards.cover.dialog.description: Drag the preview to adjust framing and use zoom to control the crop range. The original image copy is kept during development.
cards.cover.failed.title: Failed to save cover
cards.cover.failed.content: Could not save the cropped cover image.
cards.preview.title: Character Card Preview
cards.preview.staleHint: This result may be outdated. Recompile to refresh it.
cards.preview.failed.title: Preview failed
cards.compile.success.title: Character card compiled
cards.compile.success.content: A CharaPicker JSON card was generated from the formal knowledge base.
cards.compile.failed.title: Compile failed
cards.compile.loading.title: Compiling character card
cards.compile.loading.content: Reading the formal knowledge base and asking the model to review the character card. Please wait.
cards.compile.stage.ai_review: Asking the model to review and write the card
cards.compile.stream.placeholder: Model output will appear here when streaming starts.
cards.import.failed.title: Import failed
cards.export.success.title: Export complete
cards.export.partial.title: Export completed with notices
cards.export.failed.title: Export failed
cards.astrbot.partial.title: AstrBot copy sheet failed
cards.astrbot.dialog.title: AstrBot Copy Helper
cards.astrbot.dialog.description: Manually copy these fields into AstrBot. This is not a directly importable AstrBot config file.
cards.astrbot.field.name: Name
cards.astrbot.dialogues.empty: No copyable preset dialogue yet. Add a note in Extra Requirements before compiling if you want examples.
cards.busy.title: Character card task running
cards.busy.content: Please wait for the current character card task to finish.
model.title: Model Settings
model.local.models.empty: No local models found in models
model.local.download.title: Download llama.cpp
model.local.download.cancelled.title: Download cancelled
model.local.download.cancelled.content: llama.cpp download was cancelled. No new files were installed.
model.local.download.success.title: llama.cpp is ready
model.local.download.failure.title: llama.cpp download failed
model.local.test.input.placeholder: Enter a short text for the model to understand.
model.cloud.preset.name: Preset Name
model.cloud.preset.name.required: Please enter a preset name first.
model.cloud.preset.save.success.title: Cloud config saved
model.cloud.preset.save.failure.title: Save failed
model.cloud.preset.delete.success.title: Cloud config deleted
model.cloud.videoInputMode.supported: The current provider supports this video input mode.
model.cloud.videoInputMode.transcriptNot: Transcript modes run local Whisper first, adding local processing time; future cloud STT may add extra cost.
model.cloud.videoFps.mode.direct: This service passes FPS directly to the video API.
model.cloud.videoFps.mode.frame_sampling: This service samples video frames at this FPS and sends them as an image set.
model.cloud.videoFps.mode.none: This service does not support configurable video FPS.
model.cloud.models.title: Select Cloud Model
model.cloud.models.failure.title: Failed to fetch models
model.cloud.models.baseUrlRequired: Please enter the API Base URL first.
model.cloud.models.baseUrlPlaceholder: The API Base URL still contains an unresolved placeholder. Replace it before continuing.
model.cloud.test.modelRequired: Please enter the model name first.
model.cloud.test.input.placeholder: Enter a short text to send to the cloud model.
model.cloud.test.success.title: Text test passed
model.cloud.test.success.content: Cloud model endpoint is reachable and returned a response.
model.cloud.test.failure.title: Text test failed
model.cloud.test.partialFailure.content: Some tests failed. Check the detailed results.
model.cloud.test.unsupported.title: This test is not supported by the current setup
model.cloud.test.all.summary.running: Request sent, waiting for model output...
model.cloud.test.all.final.success: Text, image, audio, and video input tests all passed
model.cloud.test.all.final.completed: Testing completed; unsupported or skipped items: {skipped_items}
model.cloud.test.unsupported.image: The current provider does not declare image input support.
model.cloud.test.unsupported.audio: The current provider does not declare native audio understanding support.
model.cloud.test.unsupported.audioModel: The current model name does not look like an audio-input model. Choose Qwen-Omni / Qwen3-Omni or another audio model.
model.cloud.test.unsupported.audioApi: This audio test currently supports only DashScope/Qwen-Omni OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions input.
model.cloud.test.unsupported.video: The current provider does not declare any usable video input support.
model.cloud.test.unsupported.nativeVideo: The current provider does not support provider-native video APIs.
model.cloud.test.unsupported.frameSampli: The current provider does not support OpenAI-compatible frame-sampling video input.
model.cloud.test.unsupported.transcriptM: This mode needs the audio transcription flow. This milestone only records the setting and skips the model-page test.
model.test.input.required: Please enter test input text first.
model.test.image.placeholderResult: Image-understanding test (local placeholder): local model wiring will be added in a later step.
model.test.image.assetMissing: Image test asset does not exist: {path}
model.test.audio.placeholderResult: Audio-understanding test placeholder: local model audio wiring is not ready; cloud audio testing does not call Whisper.
model.test.audio.assetMissing: Audio test asset does not exist: {path}
model.test.video.placeholderResult: Video-understanding test placeholder: this will be wired in a later step.
model.test.video.assetMissing: Video test asset does not exist: {path}
model.test.video.ffmpegMissing: Video testing requires FFmpeg. Please install FFmpeg first.
prompts.title: Prompt Notebook
prompts.help.title: Prompt Variables
prompts.help.intro: Variables in the user prompt template are replaced with current workflow data before the model call.
prompts.help.variables.title: Variables available for this purpose:
prompts.help.variable.target_characters: Target character list, usually one or more character names.
prompts.help.variable.chunk_text: Source material text read for this extraction chunk.
prompts.help.variable.character: Target character currently being generated or checked.
prompts.help.variable.evidence_chunk: New evidence chunk used to update the character state.
prompts.help.variable.character_state: Character state JSON waiting for final consistency checks.
prompts.help.variable.source_path: Current video chunk path relative to materials/.
prompts.help.variable.chunk_id: Current full extraction season, episode, and chunk identifier.
prompts.help.variable.knowledge_summary: Character evidence summary assembled from the formal knowledge base.
prompts.help.variable.extra_requirements: Extra requirements entered on the character card page.
prompts.help.variable.compile_variant: The selected compile version, such as general, astrbot, or character_card_v2.
prompts.help.variable.compile_variant_in: Generation focus instructions for the selected compile version.
prompts.help.variable.extra_dialogue_cou: Extra dialogue sample group count; blank means auto, 0-100 means an explicit count.
prompts.help.variable.response_schema: JSON structure the character-card compile model should return.
prompts.help.note.title: Notes:
prompts.help.note.braces: Keep variables wrapped in English braces, for example {character}.
prompts.help.note.blank: If you leave the prompt blank or restore default, the built-in default prompt will be used.
prompts.save.success.title: Prompt saved
prompts.save.success.content: Blank content or text matching the default will continue to use the default prompt.
prompts.restore.success.title: Default restored
prompts.restore.success.content: This purpose will use the built-in default prompt again.
settings.title: Settings
settings.proxy.test.title: Connectivity Test
settings.proxy.changed.title: Proxy settings saved
settings.proxy.changed.content: Network requests started by CharaPicker will use the current proxy settings.
settings.proxy.localStorageHint: Proxy information is saved to local config.yaml. Please keep that file secure.
settings.theme.changed.title: Theme updated
settings.theme.changed.content: The interface theme has been applied.
settings.language.changed.title: Language updated
settings.language.changed.content: The new language will fully apply next time you start the app; new prompts and flows will use the current choice first.
about.title: About
about.description: A small desktop helper that gathers reusable character insights from anime, manga, video, images, and text sources into tidy little drawers.
about.notice.title: Notices
about.notice.legalMaterial: Only import materials you have the right to use.
about.notice.review: AI-generated content should be reviewed and is not official canon or verified fact.
about.notice.copyright: Characters, titles, and related materials belong to their respective rights holders.
about.notice.thirdParty: Third-party libraries are governed by their own open-source licenses.
about.links.title: Links
insight.empty: Click "Start Preview" and CharaPicker will place key findings here one by one.
insight.empty.preview: Click "Start Preview" and CharaPicker will place key findings here one by one.
insight.empty.fullExtraction: Click "Start Extraction" and CharaPicker will place key findings here one by one.
insightsPage.title: Insight Brook
extractor.config.title: Opening project config
extractor.config.description: Extracting characters, events, dialogue, relationships, and evidence from the materials.
extractor.chunk.title: Sampling tiny chunks
extractor.chunk.description: Preview run reads the first 2 chunks to check prompt and evidence quality.
extractor.chunk.bootstrapFromVideo: No chunk JSON found; extracting structured data from processed video chunks...
extractor.chunk.videoChunkFailed: Video chunk {current}/{total} failed: {name}. Other available results will still be used.
extractor.chunk.videoRejectedByProvider: Video chunk {current}/{total} did not pass the model provider's data inspection and was skipped: {name}. The app did not crash; other available results will still be used.
extractor.chunk.videoRejectedByProviderS: Video chunk {current}/{total} did not pass the model provider's data inspection and the current setting stopped the run: {name}. The app did not crash; enable the skip option to continue with later chunks.
extractor.chunk.outputTokenLimitReached: The model output for video chunk {name} was cut off: all {request_max_tokens} output tokens were used before the structured JSON was complete. This chunk was skipped and other results will continue; consider increasing Output Tokens / Min to at least {recommended_per_minute} before rerunning.
extractor.chunk.noChunkJson: No usable preview result was generated; preview has been stopped.
extractor.full.config.title: Preparing full extraction
extractor.full.config.description: A formal extraction plan will be generated from materials/ and all video chunks will be processed; reruns overwrite same-ID full artifacts without touching preview or legacy artifacts.
extractor.full.noCloudPreset: No usable cloud video model preset is configured; full extraction has stopped.
extractor.full.noVideoMaterials: No video materials are available in materials/ for full extraction; full extraction has stopped.
extractor.full.noChunkJson: No usable full chunk JSON was generated; full extraction has stopped.
extractor.full.chunk.title: Full extraction chunk
extractor.full.chunk.complete: Full extraction wrote {count} chunk JSON files.
extractor.full.chunk.videoChunkFailed: Full video chunk {current}/{total} failed: {name}. Later chunks will continue.
extractor.full.chunk.videoRejectedByProv: Full video chunk {current}/{total} did not pass the model provider's data inspection and was skipped: {name}. The app did not crash; full extraction will continue with later chunks.

Full video chunk {current}/{total} did not pass the model provider's data inspection and the current setting stopped the run: {name}. The app did not crash; enable the skip option to continue with later chunks.
extractor.full.chunkMissing: Video chunk source file is missing and was skipped: {path}
extractor.transcript.title: Audio transcription
extractor.transcript.requiredUnavailable: The selected video input mode requires transcript context, but no usable transcript was generated.
extractor.transcript.chunkMissing: No transcript segment is available for {episode}/{chunk}; this chunk was skipped.
extractor.transcript.prompt.withFrames: Treat TRANSCRIPT_CONTEXT as traceable dialogue/narration for this chunk, and combine it with sampled frames when extracting character information.
extractor.transcript.prompt.audioOnly: This mode provides no video frames; extract dialogue, tone, and confirmed character interactions from TRANSCRIPT_CONTEXT only, without inventing visuals.
transcription.error.noSource: No material file is available for transcription.
transcription.error.unsupportedSource: This material format is not supported for transcription yet: {path}
transcription.error.whisperRuntimeMissin: No usable whisper.cpp runtime was found. Install one from the material prep desk or choose a local runtime first.
transcription.error.whisperModelMissing: No usable Whisper model was found. Install one from the material prep desk or place it in models/whisper/.
transcription.error.noOutput: whisper.cpp did not produce a usable transcript.
extractor.insight.title: Waiting for material insights
extractor.insight.description: After AI integration, CharaPicker will write key findings to knowledge_base/targeted_insights.json.
compiler.placeholder.summary: Compiler placeholder: later it will aggregate character state through Retrieval -> Chunking -> Rolling Update.
